title: ASR Outdoor SUPER BRIGHT Baseball Hat Brim Light, 200 Lumen LED (3 Colors)
description:
While traditional headlamps might be more powerful, they do not compare to the convenience, weight and ease of use when up against the ASR Outdoor 200 Lumen LED Clip On Hat Baseball Cap Headlamp Light! A great alternative to a more complex headlamp, the cap light easily clips on to any baseball cap, visor or hardhat and features an easy to use push button to turn it on and off. ASR Outdoor SUPER BRIGHT Baseball Hat Brim Light, 200 Lumen LED (3 Colors)

While traditional headlamps might be more powerful, they do not compare to the convenience, weight and ease of use when up against the ASR Outdoor 200 Lumen LED Clip On Hat Baseball Cap Headlamp Light! A great alternative to a more complex headlamp, the cap light easily clips on to any baseball cap, visor or hardhat and features an easy to use push button to turn it on and off.

Key Features

  • 200 LUMEN BRIGHTNESS: If you need lighting when working, trekking or camping in the wilderness, the ASR Outdoor Clip On Hat Baseball Cap Headlamp Light easily replaces a traditional headlamp or hat light for ample and bright LED lighting; battery operated
  • HANDS FREE LIGHTING: With an integrated clip, the hat baseball cap light easily attaches to the brim of most baseball caps, a visor or a hardhat; the clip on light features a quick on and off switch button, giving you 200 lumens of hands free lighting with just the push of a button; can also be used as a handheld flashlight if needed
  • MULTIFUNCTIONAL: The 200 lumen LED baseball cap headlamp light is bright enough to use on job or construction sites, when gardening, for after hours running or walking, for mechanical or auto repairs, hobbies, outdoor sports, camping, hiking, trekking, backpacking and more; the LED hat light is also a great item to add to your vehicle emergency tote, bug out bag or survival kit
  • LIGHTWEIGHT: Weighing less than an ounce, the ASR Outdoor Clip On Hat Baseball Cap Headlamp Light is lightweight and won’t add any extra strenuous weight to your hat, head or neck once securely clipped on
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3.5" (L) x 2.5" (w); Material: ABS Plastic; Brightness: 200 Lumens; Bulbs: Two (2) Watt COB; Three (3) AAA Batteries included; Weight:

Product Specifications

  • MPN: GRNCLCOB
  • UPC: 810058489784
  • Size: Small

Multifunctional in nature, the LED clip on cap light boasts a 200 lumen brightness, providing ample illumination for a variety of different tasks, whether you’re taking the baseball cap light to the job site, working on hobbies or home improvement projects, making auto or mechanical repairs, trail running afterhours, reading, gardening, trekking, hunting, camping, climbing, backpacking, fishing and more. The LED cap light is also a great item to add to any bug out bag or survival kit too, in case of emergency.

Requiring just three (3) AAA batteries to operate, you don’t need to worry about charging before your activity or trip or any USB cables, power cords and the like. In addition, due to its lightweight and compact design, the baseball cap light won’t add any extra weight to your hat, head or neck when you’re on the go, providing you with hands-free lighting!

A great addition to any outdoor enthusiast’s camping gear, travel gear or backpacking gear, the lightweight clip on headlight will allow you to work efficiently, excursion safely or read leisurely without having to worry about other lighting sources like lamps, lanterns, candles or bulky uncomfortable headlamps.
